title: Eliminate intermittent e2e fixture skips (cold-start warmup + page-cap-proof seed lookups)
business_reason: The Playwright suite intermittently SKIPPED tests (silently dropping coverage — exactly the 'silent skip' the founder brain warns about). Two root causes: (1) the dev server's first Supabase query after a cold start returns empty (cold pool + Next on-demand compile) -> fixture .find() undefined -> test.skip, and a browser test occasionally flaked on a not-yet-compiled page; (2) page-cap pollution — tests create rows every run (students, roster batches), so once a table passes the kernel's 100-row page cap, a `?page_size=200` seed lookup (capped at 100, newest-first) can no longer see the oldest seed row.

fixes.cold_start: tests/global-setup.ts (wired as playwright.config globalSetup): polls the fixture API routes until each returns data (warming the DB connection pool) + pre-compiles the browser-navigated pages, before any test runs.
fixes.page_cap: seed lookups now use server-side search (?q=<code/name>) instead of ?page_size=200 + find — finds the seed row regardless of how many rows have accumulated. Converted students + roster-batch lookups (chain3, cert_generation, cert_pdf, cert_seal); schools were already converted in FR-CERT-PDF-0005.

param_14.question: Why did e2e tests intermittently skip, and how is it fixed?
param_14.answer: Cold first-query empties + accumulated test data past the 100-row page cap made fixture lookups fail, triggering test.skip. Fixed with a globalSetup warmup (DB pool + page precompile) and search-based (?q=) seed lookups that don't depend on the page window.
param_14.answer_source: observed flake across full e2e runs (2-3 skips vs the 1 permanent auth-skip); kernel listModuleRecords page_size cap = 100
param_14.security_implications: none — test infrastructure only. Improves coverage reliability (silent skips hid real coverage).
param_14.downstream_dependencies: remaining school-scoped ?page_size=200 lookups (school/roster, school/exam-slots, school/certificates, school/payments) accumulate slower and aren't yet failing; convert to ?q= as they approach the cap.
param_14.assumptions: the searched columns (school_code, batch_code, student_name, *_code) are in each list's searchColumns (they are — *code/*name match the kernel's _SEARCHABLE set).

verify: npx playwright test (x2: stable 42 passed + 1 auth-skip, 0 failures)
